steps.title: Locate the founding location
steps.content: The passage directly states: “the National Association of Black Journalists, which was founded in Washington, DC, in 1975.” This is the explicit answer to the question.

steps.title: Match the location to the choices
steps.content: The text explicitly names Washington, DC as the founding location. The other three options are never mentioned in the passage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
